title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
